title: H2A Core Grant
description: Authority for a grantee (operator) to use a subject within a bounded scope, revocable at point of use. Central H2A-Core object. iss MUST resolve under a rights-holder or fiduciary namespace, MUST NOT resolve under the operator's domain, and SHOULD NOT resolve under the implementer's domain (ADR-001).

grant_id.description: Unique grant identifier; also serves as the jti for replay protection (ADR-004).

iss.description: Issuer identity URI under a rights-holder / fiduciary namespace. Not operator; not implementer.

subject_ref.description: Key-bound URN of the governed subject (digital actor / likeness / memory principal).

grantee_ref.description: Authenticated operator identity the grant is issued to (ADR-004).

exclusions.description: Hard denials, e.g. political, adult, defamatory.

profiles.description: Which profiles apply to this grant. 'h2a-commercial' (SPEC-COMMERCIAL) is optional and never a Core conformance requirement (ADR-012).

lease.description: Budget Authority — cross-provider spend cap enforced as a lease, not a counter.

uri.description: Primary status-list URI. MUST resolve under the issuer's own endpoint, never the Foundation's.

mirrors.description: Additional CDN mirror URIs of the same signed list.

index.description: This grant's bit position in the status list.

revocation_horizon.description: Declared maximum time from revocation to non-conformant-transmission cutoff. The single conformance dial. ISO 8601 duration.

delegation.description: Attenuation-only delegation chain (ADR-004). A child grant may only narrow scope.

parent.description: grant_id of the parent, or null at chain root.

effective_chain_horizon.description: Realised horizon of the whole chain = max of all links (a chain is only as revocable as its slowest link).

max_chain_horizon.description: Ceiling the chain may not exceed.

exposure.description: Optional commercial-profile extension (SPEC-COMMERCIAL / h2a-commercial). Opaque to Core: its shape is constrained by h2a-commercial.profile.schema.json only when this grant lists 'h2a-commercial' in profiles. Not a Core conformance requirement (ADR-012). A verifier that does not implement the commercial profile MUST ignore this field and MUST NOT refuse the grant because it is present.

alg.description: Signature algorithm. ES256 (P-256) is mandatory-to-implement; curve-agnostic via this header.

signatures.description: Two detached signatures (ADR-004): consent (by subject/custodian) and issuance (by issuer). Kept separate so consent and issuance never collapse into one act.

value.description: base64url detached signature over the canonicalised grant.
